app.title: IRS Helper
app.subtitle: Easily fill your IRS Annexes G and J with broker annual reports.

popup.title: Did I save you time? 💸
popup.subtitle: Your file is ready. If this saved you time, consider supporting the project from $1. Thank you!

result.title: Processing Results
result.subtitle: {{count}} total rows were added across {{activeTables}} table(s).
result.disclaimer:
Always manually verify that the generated values are correct and placed in the right fields of the IRS form.
This is an open-source project aimed at making the IRS filing process easier — it is not a substitute for professional accounting advice.

error.no_rows: No relevant rows found in the provided file(s).
error.fallback: Something went wrong. Please refresh the page.

error.xtb_wrong_file_gains: "{{fileName}}" appears to be a Dividends PDF. Please place it in the XTB Dividends slot instead.
error.xtb_wrong_file_dividends: "{{fileName}}" appears to be a Capital Gains PDF. Please place it in the XTB Capital Gains slot instead.
error.xtb_no_gains_rows: No capital gains data found in "{{fileName}}". Please verify this is an XTB Capital Gains report.
error.xtb_no_dividends_rows: No dividend data found in "{{fileName}}". Please verify this is an XTB Dividends report.
error.tr_wrong_file: "{{fileName}}" does not appear to be a Trade Republic Tax Report. Please upload the correct file.
error.tr_no_rows: No dividend/interest data found in "{{fileName}}". Please verify this is a Trade Republic Tax Report.
error.t212_wrong_file: "{{fileName}}" does not appear to be a Trading 212 Annual Statement. Please upload the correct file.
error.t212_no_rows: No dividend/interest data found in "{{fileName}}". Please verify this is a Trading 212 Annual Statement.
error.activobank_wrong_file: "{{fileName}}" does not appear to be an ActivoBank statement. Please upload the correct file.
error.activobank_no_rows: No stock transaction data found in "{{fileName}}". Please verify this is an ActivoBank capital gains statement.
error.degiro_wrong_file: "{{fileName}}" does not appear to be a supported DEGIRO transactions CSV export.
error.degiro_no_rows: No capital gains rows found in "{{fileName}}". Please verify this DEGIRO CSV includes sell transactions.
error.degiro_incomplete_history: "{{fileName}}" is missing prior buy history required to match at least one DEGIRO sell transaction.
error.degiro_unsupported_country: "{{fileName}}" contains an unsupported ISIN country for "{{isin}}".
error.degiro_unsupported_row: "{{fileName}}" contains an unsupported or inconsistent DEGIRO transaction row.
error.freedom24_wrong_file: "{{fileName}}" does not appear to be a Freedom24 Trade Report. Please upload the correct file.
error.freedom24_no_rows: No dividend or trade data found in "{{fileName}}". Please verify this is a Freedom24 Trade Report.
error.ibkr_wrongFile: "{{fileName}}" does not appear to be an IBKR Activity Statement. Please upload the correct file.
error.ibkr_noData: No trades, dividends, or interest data found in "{{fileName}}". Please verify this is an IBKR Activity Statement.
error.file_too_large: "{{fileName}}" is too large to process safely. Please provide a smaller PDF.
error.too_many_pages: "{{fileName}}" has too many pages to process safely.
error.binance_wrong_file: "{{fileName}}" does not appear to be a supported Binance Transaction History export. Expected a header row with columns such as UTC Time, Operation, Coin, and Change.
error.binance_no_rows: No crypto capital gains found in "{{fileName}}". Verify this Binance export contains Buy/Sell transactions.
error.binance_no_sells: "{{fileName}}" contains crypto purchases but no sales for EUR. Only sales of crypto for EUR generate IRS rows.
error.revolut_wrong_file: "{{fileName}}" does not appear to be a Revolut Consolidated Statement. Please upload the correct file.

parser.warning.revolut_crypto_usd_only: Revolut PDF crypto transactions are reported in USD only. Use the CSV statement or declare crypto gains manually using ECB exchange rates.
parser.warning.revolut_csv_unsupported_r: Some Revolut CSV rows were skipped because they do not expose usable EUR values.
parser.warning.revolut_csv_commodities_u: Revolut commodities/precious metals rows are not imported. Declare them manually if applicable.

uploader.xml_description: Upload the XML file exported from the Tax Authority portal.
uploader.step1_description: Upload an XML file to enrich it, or just view the IRS tables from your broker reports.
uploader.brokers_description: Upload broker reports or CSV exports to extract financial data.
uploader.broker_selector_title: Select the brokers you want to use
uploader.broker_selector_hint: Upload fields appear only after you choose at least one broker.
uploader.broker_selector_empty: Choose one or more brokers to show their upload fields.
uploader.drag_drop: Drag & drop or click to browse
uploader.xtb_warning_1: Optional 'RENDIMENTOS OBTIDOS EM TERRITÓRIO PORTUGUÊS' (Annex E 4 B) are ignored.
uploader.xtb_warning_2: Shares/Bonds from PT-resident entities (Annex G 9) are ignored.
uploader.xtb_warning_3: Foreign sourced CFDs (Annex J 9.2 B) are ignored.
uploader.xtb_warning_4: PT sourced fractional shares (Annex G 8) are ignored.
uploader.tr_warning_1: RENDIMENTOS DE INCREMENTOS PATRIMONIAIS (Annex J 9.2 A) are ignored.
uploader.tr_warning_2: RENDIMENTOS DE INCREMENTOS PATRIMONIAIS (Annex J 9.2 B) are ignored.
uploader.t212_warning_1: Capital gains from sell trades/closed positions (Annex J 9.2A) are not yet supported.
uploader.t212_warning_2: Only English and Portuguese annual statements are supported.
uploader.activobank_warning_1: Only "Alienação Onerosa de Valores Mobiliários Estrangeiros — Ações" rows are supported.
uploader.degiro_warning_1: Only the Portuguese DEGIRO transactions CSV format is supported.
uploader.degiro_warning_2: In XML enrichment mode, only sell transactions from the declaration year are imported.
uploader.degiro_warning_3: The CSV must include full buy history for each imported sell transaction.
uploader.degiro_warning_4: Counterparty country is currently defaulted because the DEGIRO CSV does not provide the buyer's residence.
uploader.freedom24_warning_1: Equity swaps and other derivative instrument closes are not imported — declare them manually.
uploader.freedom24_warning_2: Sell trades whose opening buy belongs to a prior tax period are skipped — declare them manually.
uploader.freedom24_warning_3: ADRs with a US ISIN prefix (e.g. ASML) are mapped to country 840 (US) — verify the country field manually.
uploader.binance_warning_1: Only crypto-to-EUR buy/sell trades generate IRS rows. Crypto-to-crypto swaps are treated as lot substitutions.
uploader.binance_warning_2: Staking rewards, distributions, and earn interest create acquisition lots — they are only declared when later sold.
uploader.binance_warning_3: The managing entity country defaults to France (250). Verify this matches your Binance contracting entity.
uploader.binance_warning_4: Fees are only included when directly associated with a Buy or Sell trade.
uploader.revolut_warning_1: Crypto sales are imported from the CSV when Revolut provides EUR sale and acquisition values; PDF crypto sections are not imported.
uploader.revolut_warning_2: ADR stocks (e.g. ASML) use the trading country (US) — verify the country code matches the issuer's country.
uploader.revolut_warning_3: Flexible Cash Funds service fees are not deductible — only gross interest is reported as E21.
uploader.revolut_warning_4: Instant Access Savings interest is ignored because Portuguese tax is withheld at source.

warnings.ibkr_multiCurrency: Non-EUR trade amounts (USD, GBP, CAD, PLN) are reported in their original currency. You must manually convert these values to EUR using ECB official exchange rates for each transaction date.
warnings.ibkr_adrCountry: For ADR dividends (e.g., BABA, VALE), the source country is inferred from withholding tax descriptions. If no withholding tax exists, it defaults to the ISIN prefix country (typically US).
warnings.ibkr_optionsCode: All options and CFD profits/losses are reported under Anexo G Quadro 13 with operation code G51. Verify this classification with your tax advisor.

contact.tooltip: Suggest features or help support the project
